items.title: Cloudflare Builds High-Performance Infrastructure for Running LLMs
items.summaryShort: Cloudflare Builds High-Performance Infrastructure for Running LLMs. Cloudflare has recently announced new infrastructure designed to run large AI language models across its global network.

items.title: DuckLake 1.0: Data Lake Format with SQL Catalog Metadata
items.summaryShort: DuckLake 1.0: Data Lake Format with SQL Catalog Metadata. DuckDB Labs recently released DuckLake 1.0, a data lake format that stores table metadata in a SQL database rather than across many files in object storage.

items.title: JobRunr Introduces ClawRunr, an Open-Source Java AI Agent
items.summaryShort: JobRunr Introduces ClawRunr, an Open-Source Java AI Agent. JobRunr has introduced ClawRunr, an open-source Java AI agent for scheduled, recurring, and one-off background tasks.

items.title: Confluent Moves Schema IDs to Kafka Headers to Simplify Schema Governance
items.summaryShort: Confluent Moves Schema IDs to Kafka Headers to Simplify Schema Governance. Confluent introduces a new approach in Apache Kafka that moves schema IDs from message payloads to record headers, aiming to simplify schema governance and evolution

items.title: Meta Deploys Unified AI Agents to Automate Performance Optimization at Hyperscale
items.summaryShort: Meta Deploys Unified AI Agents to Automate Performance Optimization at Hyperscale. Meta has unveiled a new AI-driven capacity efficiency platform that uses unified AI agents to automatically detect and resolve performance issues across its

items.title: This tiny, magnetic e-reader could stop you from doomscrolling
items.summaryShort: This tiny, magnetic e-reader could stop you from doomscrolling. The Xteink X3 is a delightfully tiny, MagSafe-compatible e-ink reader that attaches to the back of your phone like a Pop Socket.

items.title: AI-generated actors and scripts are now ineligible for Oscars
items.summaryShort: AI-generated actors and scripts are now ineligible for Oscars. Bad news for Tilly Norwood.

items.title: Farewell, Jeeves: Ask.com shuts down
items.summaryShort: Farewell, Jeeves: Ask.com shuts down. Owner IAC says it's discontinuing its search business.
